what_it_does: Records metadata for a channel-memory attachment of type images in the design-assets channel, pointing to a specific image asset target and noting when it was added.
observations: YAML frontmatter with no body content
standouts: Typed image attachment record for design-assets channel
Target uses an image:// URI scheme
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter in a Markdown file
Target expressed as a namespaced URI
concerns: No title, alt text, dimensions, or MIME type for the image
No surrounding message or thread context
notes: A bare attachment ledger entry that links a design-assets channel record to a guided-tour feature icon image.
questions: What channel message or thread does this attachment belong to?
What does the Feature_1_GuidedTour icon depict?
Who added this attachment and why?
Is the image:// target resolvable elsewhere?
purpose_vs_actual: The file matches its apparent purpose as a channel attachment record; it stores a typed pointer to an image asset.
intention_signals: It appears to be registering an image attachment for a design-assets channel entry, specifically tying it to a feature guided-tour icon.
novelty: The target field uses an image:// URI scheme rather than a plain filesystem path.
contribution: Provides a timestamped, typed pointer from a channel attachment record to a specific design-assets image asset, supporting traceability of which images are attached to channel content.
summary_for_embedding: This file is a channel-memory attachment record (att-fb6ccb79) for the design-assets channel, typed as images, targeting the image asset image://design-assets/icons/Feature_1_GuidedTour and recording an added timestamp.
intention_for_embedding: It was meant to catalog and link an image attachment to a design-assets channel entry.
